name: Sourcegraph
philosophy: Code-search and AI coding assistant rendered with the inside-of-a-compiler aesthetic — slate near-black, electric cyan-blue voltage, violet for Cody, half the homepage is real syntax-highlighted code.

design_language.motion_signature: 180ms ease-out hover; signature cyan gradient-line tracing under the wordmark on load; syntax-highlight pulse on code mockup reveal.

trademark_signals: Cyan-blue (#00cbec) is the unwavering brand voltage
Violet reserved for Cody (AI assistant) feature pages — a sub-brand color
Code-search mockup as homepage hero — real product UI as marketing artifact
Wordmark uses custom S with search-magnifier dot accent
Dark-canvas customer logo strip with 1px hairlines between
ai_slop_avoided: Don't render a light-mode marketing surface
Don't add mascot characters or anthropomorphize Cody
Don't add saturated rainbow gradients to syntax themes
